prompt: Use the attached image as the STYLE and COLOR reference (warm golden-white and amber bioluminescent glow on a deep dark background). Now create a FULL-BODY, FRONT-FACING translucent glowing human figure — the ENTIRE body visible from the top of the head down to the feet, standing, facing the camera straight on. KEY ELEMENTS: at the TOP of the head / crown, a detailed anatomical human BRAIN glowing and partially exposed; running vertically straight down the CENTER FRONT of the body (from the upper chest down through the torso to the pelvis), a luminous bright glowing DNA double-helix strand as the hero focal element; translucent botanical LEAVES and delicate leaf-vein / nerve networks woven throughout the whole body and limbs; the figure's face is calm, serene and softly glowing-translucent (gentle, not detailed or uncanny). The whole body radiates warm golden-white and amber bioluminescent light with glowing particles, sparks, and a soft warm cosmic nebula/dust spreading out behind it. Deep dark warm-charcoal background so the golden glow pops. Premium, mystical wellness aesthetic, photoreal volumetric light, fine grain. No text, no logos. Centered full-body composition, head-to-feet, with breathing room around the figure.
